topic.what: Global consensus reclassifying H. pylori gastritis as an infectious disease warranting eradication regardless of symptoms.
topic.how: Expert consensus (Delphi method) with systematic evidence review endorsing universal H. pylori eradication.
topic.why_matters: Shifted gastritis from 'incidental finding' to 'treatable infectious disease' — the culmination of the post-Marshall paradigm shift.

characteristics.vs_baseline: More aggressive than prior Maastricht recommendations

not_for: Populations where H. pylori prevalence is very low
Individual risk-benefit in Blaser's amphibiont framework

novelty: Reclassified gastritis itself as treatable (not just its complications)
Positioned H. pylori gastritis as infectious disease
